Creative Workspace Suite • By Yash Pathak (License)

NexEditor Lab

Creative Workspace Suite

Local & Secure Processing
Created by Yash Pathak • License

Dashboard Overview

Welcome to NexEditor Lab. Convert your files securely.

Local Engine Active

Fast, Local, and Beautiful PDF Generation

Select a workspace tool below to begin your PDF document creation. Everything runs directly in your browser—no files ever touch a server.

Photos to PDF

Upload files (JPG, PNG, WebP), crop, rotate, reorder via drag-and-drop, and merge them into a single high-quality PDF.

Open Photos Workspace

Notes & Text to PDF

Write raw or structured notes in our WYSIWYG rich text editor, choose templates, apply custom typography, and print to styled PDFs.

Open Notes Workspace

Edit & Annotate PDF

Upload an existing PDF, write text comments, sign pages with freehand drawing, and export the finished document securely.

Open Editor Workspace

PDF Compressor

Reduce the file size of your PDF documents locally. Control compression quality and downscale page images dynamically.

Open Compressor Workspace

Photo Compressor

Compress PNG, JPEG, and WebP images locally in your browser. Choose custom output quality and save storage space.

Open Compressor Workspace

Photo Resizer

Resize images proportionally with aspect ratio lock or scale by percentage. Instantly export to WebP/JPEG/PNG.

Open Resizer Workspace

PDF Page Organizer

Merge multiple PDFs, split documents, delete pages, or drag-and-drop pages to reorder them completely offline.

Open Organizer Workspace

PDF Merger

Combine up to 20 PDF files into a single document in any order. Drag-and-drop to reorder files easily.

Open Merger Workspace

PDF to Image

Convert PDF pages into high-resolution PNG, JPEG, or WebP images and download them as a ZIP archive locally.

Open Converter Workspace

Image Text Extractor

Extract copyable text from photos or scanned PDF documents offline using client-side OCR engine text scanning.

Open Extractor Workspace

Markdown to PDF

Write documents using Markdown syntax with live styled side-by-side print preview layouts and print to PDF.

Open Editor Workspace

Pro Features Included

Drag & Drop Reorder

Easily swap and sort uploaded images before generating the document.

Instant Rotation

Rotate individual images by 90-degree steps to fit margins perfectly.

Visual Templates

Start drafting quickly with Meeting Notes, CV outlines, and Letter templates.

Drag & drop photos here

Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP images (max 10MB per file)

0 Images Drag cards to reorder the PDF page sequence

PDF Configuration

85%
Higher quality results in larger file size

Creative Document Workspace

Welcome to your styled notes interface. You can type notes here directly, select a template from the right, format text, and generate beautifully typeset PDF documents.

Feel free to select text to try out formatting options, add list items, tables, or insert the current date. Make your notes clean and clear!

Quick Templates

Load pre-styled structures into your editor.

Styling & Options

Drag & drop PDF here to Edit

Upload an existing PDF (max 15MB)

Edit Tools

Choose an editing mode to modify pages.

4px
18px

Drag & drop PDF here to Compress

Reduce PDF file size locally (max 15MB)

document.pdf

Original Size: 4.5 MB

Compression Options

Choose the compression level to apply.

Drag & drop photos here to Compress

Compress JPEG, PNG, and WebP images (max 10MB per file)

0 Images

Compression Level

Control the image size and quality trade-off.

70%

Drag & drop photos here to Resize

Resize PNG, JPEG, and WebP images (max 10MB per file)

0 Images

Resize Settings

Adjust width and height dimensions.

50%

Drag & drop PDF files here to Organize

Upload one or multiple PDFs. Merge, split, reorder, or rotate pages offline.

0 Pages Loaded

Organizer Options

Configure final page assembly.

Drag pages to reorder them. Hover over page cards to rotate or delete individual pages from the compiled output document.

Drag & drop PDF files here to Merge

Upload up to 20 PDF files. Combine them offline in any order.

0 Files Loaded

Merge Options

Configure final document output.

Drag files in the list to reorder the merging sequence. Click the delete icon on a card to remove that file from the merge queue. Max limit is 20 files.

Drag & drop PDF here to convert to Images

Convert individual pages of your PDF document into JPEG/PNG/WebP offline.

No PDF loaded

Conversion Options

Set image formats and rendering resolution.

Conversion runs 100% locally. Converting at 3x scale may require more device memory and time.

Drag & drop Image/PDF here to Extract Text

Extract text locally using client-side OCR. Accept JPEG, PNG, WebP, or single-page PDF.

No file loaded

Extraction Control

Set language and copy parsed characters.

Markdown Editor
HTML Live Preview
Your Company Name
123 Business Rd, Suite 100 City, State, Zip Phone: (123) 456-7890 Email: contact@company.com

Document Layout

Set styling options for PDF printing.

Tag Syntax Result Description
# Title Main Heading (H1)
## Section Sub-sections (H2)
### Info Small Heading (H3)
**Bold** Strong Bolded Text
*Italic* Emphasized Text
--- Horizontal Divider
- Bullet Unordered List Item
1. Number Ordered List Item
| A | B | Grid Table Layout
> Quote Indented Quote Box

Generating PDF

Processing images and assembling PDF. Please wait...

Software License & Copyright

Proprietary Ownership Certificate

Markdown Tag Guide

Instructions on how to write & format content using tags

1. Headings (Titles & Sections)

Use the hash symbol # followed by a space to create headings. Headings structure your document.

Tag Syntax Type / Result
# Main Title Document Title / H1 (Use once per page)
## Section Header Major Section heading / H2
### Subsection Header Minor details or subsections / H3

2. Text Styling

Apply styles to emphasize specific parts of your text.

Tag Syntax Type / Result
**bold text** Bold text for important key words
*italic text* Italic text for light emphasis
***bold & italic*** Bold and italicized combined styling
~~strikethrough~~ Strikethrough text for deleted info
`code style` code style for technical keywords or codes

3. Lists & Tables

Organize items into structured bulleted lists, numbered tasks, or columns.

Tag Syntax Example Resulting Layout
- Apple - Banana - Cherry
  • Apple
  • Banana
  • Cherry
1. First item 2. Second item
  1. First item
  2. Second item
| Item | Price | |---|---| | Coffee | $3.50 | | Tea | $2.50 |
ItemPrice
Coffee$3.50
Tea$2.50

4. Layout Controls (Lines, Spacing, Quotes)

Separate content dynamically or format callout boxes.

Tag Syntax Resulting Action
--- Horizontal Divider Line. You can customize the thickness and color in the "Document Layout" sidebar.
> Your quote text here
Your quote text here
<br> or empty lines Adds vertical space / line breaks between paragraphs.
[Link Title](https://example.com) Clickable URL reference link in the preview.
